channel.title: Swift on Coosis's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Swift on Coosis's Blog

item.title: First-Time: IOS App
item.author: 1159727122@qq.com (Coosis)
item.description: Before Everything Else: Now a college student, I need a way to manage all my classes somehow. Of course, there’s the built-in calendar app that can do that, but I think we all know how difficult and frustrating it is to put all classes into the calendar app. I wanted to make my own. Swift and Swift UI: Naturally, apple expects you to build app using Swift and Swift UI. Swift UI is a powerful framework used to build app for ios, watch os, ipad os and mac os, etc.
